TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Bunun, story: bnNr-pear_Talum
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: adii madaingaz tama hai kitngaab saia matapul lapat.
S.PHON: adii madaiŋað tama x~χai kitŋaab saia matapul~ɬ l~ɬapat.
S.FORM: adii madaingaz tama hai kitngaab saia matapul lapat.
S.PHON: adii madaiŋað tama x~χai kitŋaab saia matapul~ɬ l~ɬapat.
S.TRANSL: 那個老人,他開始採番石榴.
That old man over there, he begins to pluck guavas.

S.FORM: matapul saia lapattan aiza muhalhal hai matmuzin a sivazun aupa tutuun saicia tu sia kalalacia.
S.PHON: matapul~ɬ saia l~ɬapattan aiða mux~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬ x~χai matmuðin a ɕivaðun aupa tutuun saiʨia tu ɕia kal~ɬal~ɬaʨia.
S.FORM: matapul saia lapattan aiza muhalhal hai matmuzin a sivazun aupa tutuun saicia tu sia kalalacia.
S.PHON: matapul~ɬ saia l~ɬapattan aiða mux~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬ x~χai matmuðin a ɕivaðun aupa tutuun saiʨia tu ɕia kal~ɬal~ɬaʨia.
S.TRANSL: 他把芭樂弄下來,裝滿網袋.
He takes them down, fills the bag, and puts them in the basket.

S.FORM: pisialun saicia kankan sia kalala at.
S.PHON: piɕial~ɬun saiʨia kankan ɕia kal~ɬal~ɬa at.
S.FORM: pisialun saicia kankan sia kalala at.
S.PHON: piɕial~ɬun saiʨia kankan ɕia kal~ɬal~ɬa at.
S.TRANSL: 他把他們好好整理在籃子裡面.
He arranges them correctly in the basket.

S.FORM: saduan saicia tu mais masial hai mais makuang haishaisun malanglang.
S.PHON: saduan saiʨia tu mais maɕial~ɬ x~χai mais makuaŋ x~χaisx~χaisun mal~ɬaŋl~ɬaŋ.
S.FORM: saduan saicia tu mais masial hai mais makuang haishaisun malanglang.
S.PHON: saduan saiʨia tu mais maɕial~ɬ x~χai mais makuaŋ x~χaisx~χaisun mal~ɬaŋl~ɬaŋ.

TRANSL.notes: 他看到哪些是好的,哪些是不好的,擦乾淨(果子).

S.TRANSL: 他看到哪些是好的,哪些是不好的,擦乾淨 .
He sees if they are good or bad and wipes them clean.

S.FORM: at muhnaang a saia kudadaza at matapul at aiza tu tacini bunun lahaib maskus maisia sidi a patankakaun asia sidi.
S.PHON: at mux~χnaaŋ a saia kudadaða at matapul~ɬ at aiða tu taʨini bunun l~ɬax~χaib maskus maiɕia ɕidi a patankakaun aɕia ɕidi.
S.FORM: at muhnaang a saia kudadaza at matapul at aiza tu tacini bunun lahaib maskus maisia sidi a patankakaun asia sidi.
S.PHON: at mux~χnaaŋ a saia kudadaða at matapul~ɬ at aiða tu taʨini bunun l~ɬax~χaib maskus maiɕia ɕidi a patankakaun aɕia ɕidi.
S.TRANSL: 接著,他又上去,然後有一個人牽著山羊經過,他讓山羊吃草.
Then, he goes up and harvests again. Then there is a person passing by with a goat, which he let graze.

S.FORM: maza madaingaza hai nii saia islunghu.
S.PHON: maða madaiŋaða x~χai nii saia isl~ɬuŋx~χu.
S.FORM: maza madaingaza hai nii saia islunghu.
S.PHON: maða madaiŋaða x~χai nii saia isl~ɬuŋx~χu.
S.TRANSL: 那個老人,他不休息.
That old man, he does not rest.

S.FORM: matatapul masisivit tu mais mahtu tapulun hai sizaun at.
S.PHON: matatapul~ɬ maɕiɕivit tu mais max~χtu tapul~ɬun x~χai ɕiðaun at.
S.FORM: matatapul masisivit tu mais mahtu tapulun hai sizaun at.
S.PHON: matatapul~ɬ maɕiɕivit tu mais max~χtu tapul~ɬun x~χai ɕiðaun at.
S.TRANSL: 他在一邊採果子一邊觀察果子是否可以被採.
He's plucking and observing if they can be plucked and taken.

S.FORM: aiza uvaaz tasa uvaaz lahaib tuntatanpu.
S.PHON: aiða uvaað tasa uvaað l~ɬax~χaib tuntatanpu.
S.FORM: aiza uvaaz tasa uvaaz lahaib tuntatanpu.
S.PHON: aiða uvaað tasa uvaað l~ɬax~χaib tuntatanpu.
S.TRANSL: 有一個孩子騎單車.
There is a child riding his bike.

S.FORM: nadadu saia mapahahainan hai.
S.PHON: nadadu saia mapax~χax~χainan x~χai.
S.FORM: nadadu saia mapahahainan hai.
S.PHON: nadadu saia mapax~χax~χainan x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 說不定他要過去玩.
Maybe he's going over there to play.

S.FORM: islunghu saia sadu tu at supah a cinapul lapatan at.
S.PHON: isl~ɬuŋx~χu saia sadu tu at supax~χ a ʨinapul~ɬ l~ɬapatan at.
S.FORM: islunghu saia sadu tu at supah a cinapul lapatan at.
S.PHON: isl~ɬuŋx~χu saia sadu tu at supax~χ a ʨinapul~ɬ l~ɬapatan at.
S.TRANSL: 他在休息,看到很多被採摘的番石榴.
He's resting and sees that there are many guavas that have been plucked.

S.FORM: samangha saia sadu tu maza madaingaza hai adadazaang matapul.
S.PHON: samaŋx~χa saia sadu tu maða madaiŋaða x~χai adadaðaaŋ matapul~ɬ.
S.FORM: samangha saia sadu tu maza madaingaza hai adadazaang matapul.
S.PHON: samaŋx~χa saia sadu tu maða madaiŋaða x~χai adadaðaaŋ matapul~ɬ.
S.TRANSL: 他抬起頭看到老人還在採.

TRANSL.notes: He looks upward and sees that the old man is still there plucking (fruit).

S.TRANSL: He looks upward and sees that the old man is still there plucking .

S.FORM: at ana siza saia tu tasa hai miliskin saia tu langaci niiang madaingaza masivit at.
S.PHON: at ana ɕiða saia tu tasa x~χai mil~ɬiskin saia tu l~ɬaŋaʨi niiaŋ madaiŋaða maɕivit at.
S.FORM: at ana siza saia tu tasa hai miliskin saia tu langaci niiang madaingaza masivit at.
S.PHON: at ana ɕiða saia tu tasa x~χai mil~ɬiskin saia tu l~ɬaŋaʨi niiaŋ madaiŋaða maɕivit at.
S.TRANSL: 他想拿一個也沒關係,反正老人也沒在看.
If he takes one, he thinks that's okay. The old man isn't looking anyway.

S.FORM: ansahanun saicia tas tu kalalaa antaban.
S.PHON: ansax~χanun saiʨia tas tu kal~ɬal~ɬaa antaban.
S.FORM: ansahanun saicia tas tu kalalaa antaban.
S.PHON: ansax~χanun saiʨia tas tu kal~ɬal~ɬaa antaban.
S.TRANSL: 他搬走一個籃子.
He takes one basket away.

S.FORM: tanghaiuun saicia tas tu kalalaa madas mudaan.
S.PHON: taŋx~χaiuun saiʨia tas tu kal~ɬal~ɬaa madas mudaan.
S.FORM: tanghaiuun saicia tas tu kalalaa madas mudaan.
S.PHON: taŋx~χaiuun saiʨia tas tu kal~ɬal~ɬaa madas mudaan.
S.TRANSL: 他把一籃子全部偷走.
He takes a basket away.

S.FORM: at maza madaingaza hai nii saia haiap saia ka malala'la matatapul.
S.PHON: at maða madaiŋaða x~χai nii saia x~χaiap saia ka mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa matatapul~ɬ.
S.FORM: at maza madaingaza hai nii saia haiap saia ka malala'la matatapul.
S.PHON: at maða madaiŋaða x~χai nii saia x~χaiap saia ka mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa matatapul~ɬ.
S.TRANSL: 那個老人不知道,所以沒有大喊地一直在採果實.
The old man is unaware so he doesn't yell and keeps plucking.

S.FORM: sadu saia tu aiza tasa amin a binanauaz tuntampu hai cinhuza saia kalinkusbaiun tamuungan nii tu sadu hai paptuh a tauntauna sia tampu asia batu at mucingkul.
S.PHON: sadu saia tu aiða tasa amin a binanauað tuntampu x~χai ʨinx~χuða saia kal~ɬinkusbaiun tamuuŋan nii tu sadu x~χai paptux~χ a tauntauna ɕia tampu aɕia batu at muʨiŋkul~ɬ.
S.FORM: sadu saia tu aiza tasa amin a binanauaz tuntampu hai cinhuza saia kalinkusbaiun tamuungan nii tu sadu hai paptuh a tauntauna sia tampu asia batu at mucingkul.
S.PHON: sadu saia tu aiða tasa amin a binanauað tuntampu x~χai ʨinx~χuða saia kal~ɬinkusbaiun tamuuŋan nii tu sadu x~χai paptux~χ a tauntauna ɕia tampu aɕia batu at muʨiŋkul~ɬ.
S.TRANSL: 他看到有一個女生騎過來,她的帽子被風吹掉.他看呆了,沒注意到他輪子碰到石頭,讓他跌掉.
He's shocked because he sees a girl also biking over, whose hat has been blown off by the wind, and he doesn't see his tire hitting a stone, as he falls on the ground.

S.FORM: pantutu maza sia siniza saicia maza lapat at.
S.PHON: pantutu maða ɕia ɕiniða saiʨia maða l~ɬapat at.
S.FORM: pantutu maza sia siniza saicia maza lapat at.
S.PHON: pantutu maða ɕia ɕiniða saiʨia maða l~ɬapat at.
S.TRANSL: 他所拿的番石榴也都倒出來了.
The guavas he took spill out.

S.FORM: saduan saicia bantas tu pan'uni madahpa.
S.PHON: saduan saiʨia bantas tu panʔuni madax~χpa.
S.FORM: saduan saicia bantas tu pan'uni madahpa.
S.PHON: saduan saiʨia bantas tu panʔuni madax~χpa.
S.TRANSL: 他看到腳有沒有受傷.
He looks if his foot didn't get hurt.

S.FORM: aiza dii tatau uvaaz minduduaza uvaaz sia daancia mapahahainan at sadu tu mucingkul saia.
S.PHON: aiða dii tatau uvaað minduduaða uvaað ɕia daanʨia mapax~χax~χainan at sadu tu muʨiŋkul~ɬ saia.
S.FORM: aiza dii tatau uvaaz minduduaza uvaaz sia daancia mapahahainan at sadu tu mucingkul saia.
S.PHON: aiða dii tatau uvaað minduduaða uvaað ɕia daanʨia mapax~χax~χainan at sadu tu muʨiŋkul~ɬ saia.
S.TRANSL: 有三個年輕人在路上玩耍,看到他跌倒.
There are three young people playing who see him falling over.

S.FORM: indangazan naicia saia kankan.
S.PHON: indaŋaðan naiʨia saia kankan.
S.FORM: indangazan naicia saia kankan.
S.PHON: indaŋaðan naiʨia saia kankan.
S.TRANSL: 他們去幫忙他裝籃子.
They help him fill the basket.

S.FORM: kanahtungan naicia kankan mindia ansahanun naicia.
S.PHON: kanax~χtuŋan naiʨia kankan mindia ansax~χanun naiʨia.
S.FORM: kanahtungan naicia kankan mindia ansahanun naicia.
S.PHON: kanax~χtuŋan naiʨia kankan mindia ansax~χanun naiʨia.
S.TRANSL: 裝好後,他們幫他搬起來.
After collecting, they help him put up the basket.

S.FORM: ispa'amaang saicia.
S.PHON: ispaʔamaaŋ saiʨia.
S.FORM: ispa'amaang saicia.
S.PHON: ispaʔamaaŋ saiʨia.
S.TRANSL: 還有給他載.
And help him carry it.

S.FORM: maza sia adii uvaaza umanun batu maza hailangan tu lahaiban tu tanpu.
S.PHON: maða ɕia adii uvaaða umanun batu maða x~χail~ɬaŋan tu l~ɬax~χaiban tu tanpu.
S.FORM: maza sia adii uvaaza umanun batu maza hailangan tu lahaiban tu tanpu.
S.PHON: maða ɕia adii uvaaða umanun batu maða x~χail~ɬaŋan tu l~ɬax~χaiban tu tanpu.
S.TRANSL: 他們幫忙拿掉阻礙的石頭.
They help taking away the stone that blocked the way.

S.FORM: ungat tasa uvaaz hai inkaduas isaicia tamuung kalinkusbaiun pis'ulukin saicia mala'la at masatu masaiv.
S.PHON: uŋat tasa uvaað x~χai inkaduas isaiʨia tamuuŋ kal~ɬinkusbaiun pisʔul~ɬukin saiʨia mal~ɬaʔl~ɬa at masatu masaiv.
S.FORM: ungat tasa uvaaz hai inkaduas isaicia tamuung kalinkusbaiun pis'ulukin saicia mala'la at masatu masaiv.
S.PHON: uŋat tasa uvaað x~χai inkaduas isaiʨia tamuuŋ kal~ɬinkusbaiun pisʔul~ɬukin saiʨia mal~ɬaʔl~ɬa at masatu masaiv.
S.TRANSL: 一個小孩子見到他被吹掉的帽子,呼嘯叫過來,送過去給他.
One child sees the hat that was blown off, and whistles over, to give him the hat.

S.FORM: sia adii uvaaza siniza mas lapata hai masaiv naitan tu tacini hai satatasa kaupa tu kaunun naicia.
S.PHON: ɕia adii uvaaða ɕiniða mas l~ɬapata x~χai masaiv naitan tu taʨini x~χai satatasa kaupa tu kaunun naiʨia.
S.FORM: sia adii uvaaza siniza mas lapata hai masaiv naitan tu tacini hai satatasa kaupa tu kaunun naicia.
S.PHON: ɕia adii uvaaða ɕiniða mas l~ɬapata x~χai masaiv naitan tu taʨini x~χai satatasa kaupa tu kaunun naiʨia.
S.TRANSL: 這個拿番石榴的孩子給他們三個一人一個來吃
This kid that took the guavas gives them one each to eat.

S.FORM: maupacia naia mudadaan maunmaunmaun kulumah.
S.PHON: maupaʨia naia mudadaan maunmaunmaun kul~ɬumax~χ.
S.FORM: maupacia naia mudadaan maunmaunmaun kulumah.
S.PHON: maupaʨia naia mudadaan maunmaunmaun kul~ɬumax~χ.
S.TRANSL: 這樣子他們邊走邊吃回家.
This way, they go home while eating.

S.FORM: madaingaza hai kanahtungin saia matapul at kunastuin.
S.PHON: madaiŋaða x~χai kanax~χtuŋin saia matapul~ɬ at kunastuin.
S.FORM: madaingaza hai kanahtungin saia matapul at kunastuin.
S.PHON: madaiŋaða x~χai kanax~χtuŋin saia matapul~ɬ at kunastuin.
S.TRANSL: 老人收完了,就下來了.
The old man is done harvesting, and goes down.

S.FORM: masivit tu 'ia tu ana tau tu kalala 'ia tu isuka tasa kalala. a
S.PHON: maɕivit tu ʔia tu ana tau tu kal~ɬal~ɬa ʔia tu isuka tasa kal~ɬal~ɬa. a
S.FORM: masivit tu 'ia tu ana tau tu kalala 'ia tu isuka tasa kalala. a
S.PHON: maɕivit tu ʔia tu ana tau tu kal~ɬal~ɬa ʔia tu isuka tasa kal~ɬal~ɬa. a
S.TRANSL: 他看,原來的三個籃子怎麼會少了一個?
He sees, originally there were three baskets, but one is missing?

S.FORM: miliskin saia tu masikuadau? sadu tu askadii tantatau uvaaza mudadaan mapahainan naia sapahsapah.
S.PHON: mil~ɬiskin saia tu maɕikuadau? sadu tu askadii tantatau uvaaða mudadaan mapax~χainan naia sapax~χsapax~χ.
S.FORM: miliskin saia tu masikuadau? sadu tu askadii tantatau uvaaza mudadaan mapahainan naia sapahsapah.
S.PHON: mil~ɬiskin saia tu maɕikuadau? sadu tu askadii tantatau uvaaða mudadaan mapax~χainan naia sapax~χsapax~χ.
S.TRANSL: 他想說,去哪裡了?他看到三個孩子邊走邊玩邊吃.
He thinks, where to? He sees three children walking and eating at the same time.

W.TRANSL: 可見.遠距-途中某處-那裡

S.FORM: kaz uvaaza maupacia mututusbut mudaan tama hai madaingaz hai ka isaincia amin saia kanahtung mama isaicia tu haimangsut mudaan kulumah.
S.PHON: kað uvaaða maupaʨia mututusbut mudaan tama x~χai madaiŋað x~χai ka isainʨia amin saia kanax~χtuŋ mama isaiʨia tu x~χaimaŋsut mudaan kul~ɬumax~χ.
S.FORM: kaz uvaaza maupacia mututusbut mudaan tama hai madaingaz hai ka isaincia amin saia kanahtung mama isaicia tu haimangsut mudaan kulumah.
S.PHON: kað uvaaða maupaʨia mututusbut mudaan tama x~χai madaiŋað x~χai ka isainʨia amin saia kanax~χtuŋ mama isaiʨia tu x~χaimaŋsut mudaan kul~ɬumax~χ.
S.TRANSL: 那些孩子就這樣一直往前走,老人就這樣準備結束工作回家.
Those kids keep walking, the old man is preparing to finish work and go home.
